name: stackra/scope
purpose: Dynamic hierarchical scope platform — per-tenant configurable hierarchy, materialised-path node graph, namespaced cascading value store, and request-context propagation.
capabilities: Materialised-path node graph for O(1) ancestor traversal
ResolveScope middleware (Header, JWT, TenantContext, Root fallback)
when_to_use: Any configuration owner needs a per-tenant hierarchy of override values — settings, permissions, feature flags, pricing, notifications.
when_not_to_use: For row-level tenant scoping, use the BelongsToTenant trait from the tenancy module instead.
